ddls:
CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "game_date" TEXT /* Date of the game */,
  "home_team" TEXT /* Home team */,
  "away_team" TEXT /* Away team */,
  "referee" TEXT /* Referee */,
  "stadium" TEXT /* Name of the stadium where the game was played */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of spectators at the game */,
  "weather" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the game */,
  "play_clock" INTEGER /* Whether the play clock was a factor */,
  "tv_network" TEXT /* TV network broadcasting the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "conference" TEXT /* Conference the team belongs to */,
  "division" TEXT /* Division the team is in */,
  "mascot" TEXT /* Team mascot */,
  "head_coach" TEXT /* Name of the head coach */,
  "stadium" TEXT /* Home stadium of the team */,
  "founded" TEXT /* Year the team was founded */,
  "website" TEXT /* Team's official website */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "referees" (
  "referee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each referee */,
  "referee_name" TEXT /* Full name of the referee */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the referee */,
  "years_of_experience" INTEGER /* Number of years the referee has officiated */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position within the officiating crew */,
  "certification" TEXT /* Certification level of the referee */,
  "rating" REAL /* Performance rating of the referee */,
  "home_city" TEXT /* City where the referee is based */,
  "last_training" TEXT /* Date of the last training or certification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("referee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "penalty_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each penalty type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the penalty type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the penalty type */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the penalty type */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity level of the penalty type */,
  "impact" TEXT /* Impact on the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., coach, player, referee, analyst) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* User account status */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "penalty_id" INTEGER /* ID of the penalty being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the penalty data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the penalty data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access session in seconds */,
  "location" TEXT /* Geographical location of the user */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
column_names: Name of the stadium where the game was played
Number of spectators at the game
Whether the play clock was a factor
Number of years the referee has officiated
